subject: remove github action workflows. replace with local auditor
instructions: when you have a pr ready, hand it to and auditor to pull it and check it for completeness, code quality, adherence to pr checklist, agents.md stuff, and security concerns.
lastOutput:
sn't reference GitHub Actions directly. It's good as-is — the local auditor will read this template and check PRs against it. No changes needed.
Let me verify the TypeScript compiles before committing.
